data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures access across all device types by adapting layout responsively.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries, fluid grids, and flexible images.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: A microservices architecture that decomposes the site into small services.

data.title: CDN Integration
data.description: Utilization of Content Delivery Networks for faster load times.
data.technical_spec: Integration with services like Cloudflare or Akamai.

data.title: Scalable Backend
data.description: Backend designed to handle high volumes of traffic.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Functions hosted in serverless platforms to reduce infrastructure overhead.
